description: A vertical, portrait-orientation slogan graphic with a blue-tinted color photograph of Border Patrol / law-enforcement agents riding ATVs (all-terrain quad bikes) in a line, the lead rider wearing a full-face motocross-style helmet, goggles and a dark uniform jacket with an agency badge on the chest, with additional helmeted agents and a UTV vehicle behind. The whole photo carries a cool blue duotone wash. In the upper-left corner a solid blue rectangle holds white bold serif text: 'Making America Safe Again.' Across the lower portion, large bold white sans-serif text reads: 'Our borders are closed to criminals.' followed by 'America welcomes those who respect our laws.' The composition pairs militarized enforcement imagery with a two-part slogan that contrasts exclusion of 'criminals' with welcome for the law-abiding. The messaging technique combines a tough-on-the-border visual with a 'Making America Safe Again' brand line (echoing MAGA) to project strength and a law-and-order immigration stance. Target audience is the general public and supporters, signaling aggressive border enforcement framed as common-sense rule of law.
notable_text: Making America Safe Again; Our borders are closed to criminals. America welcomes those who respect our laws.
